def: s.m. Instability, unsteadiness, fickleness; uncertainty.
s.m. Place, site, soil, dry or firm ground ( = thal); stand or station of a faqīr; a kind of monastery in which religious mendicants abide under a Mahant or superior.
more: s. m. Place, site, soil, dry or firm ground; place or stand of a faḳīr.

def: n. m. S. स्थल a place. See asthān . 1. A kind of free monastery in which communities of religious mendicants reside together under a Mahant (a chief or abbot). 2. A stand or station of a faqīr. Yeh tapassī bābā kā asthal hai .
s.m. Place, position, locality, situation, spot; post, seat, station; abode, residence; temple, shrine
more: n. m. S. स्थान from स्था to place, P. āstān . 1. Locality; receptacle; situation ( ṭhāṅo ); position; spot; point; post; seat; station ( jagah ). 2. Abode; residence; home ( ghar ). Bābā jī kahāṅ asthān hai? 3. Temple; shrine ( mandar ). Yeh kis deotā kā asthān hai? asthān' de'nā , v. a. To lodge; place; locate ( jagah denā ).
subs: (-ko), To place; to locate; to lodge.

def: s.m. Setting up, erecting, act of establishing, establishment; appointment
more: n. m. S. स्थापन from स्था to place. Establishment; the act of establishing; appointment. asthā'pan kar'nā , v. a. To establish; dedicate; fix; set ( padhrānā ). Mandar meṅ Mahādev kā asthāpan karo .
subs: v.t. To set up, establish; to fix; to dedicate.

def: adj. Not steadfast; unsteady; not fixed, movable, moving.
s.m. Bone ( = haḍḍī)
subs: s.m. The joining of the bones; sinews
s.m. Fracture of the bones; name of a plant of supposed efficacy in fractures, Cissus quadrangularis
s.m. Lit. 'Cage of bones'; bag of bones, skeleton
s.f. Uniting of a broken bone
s.m. Dryness and decay of the bones
Mere bones, nothing but bones; full of bones

def: s.m. = استهہ asthi, q.v. s.m. Bone ( = haḍḍī)
subs: s.m. The joining of the bones; sinews
s.m. Fracture of the bones; name of a plant of supposed efficacy in fractures, Cissus quadrangularis
s.m. Lit. 'Cage of bones'; bag of bones, skeleton
s.f. Uniting of a broken bone
s.m. Dryness and decay of the bones
Mere bones, nothing but bones; full of bones

def: n. m. A bone. asthi bhaṅg , n. m. A plant of supposed efficacy in resetting a fracture; Cissus quadrangularis . Wat.
wety: From Sanskrit अस्थि (asthi), from Proto-Indo-Iranian *HastH-, from Proto-Indo-European *h₃estH-, *h₃ost-.

def: adj. Unstable, unsteady; uncertain, restless, fickle.
s.f. Instability, unsteadiness; uncertainty; fickleness.
part. adj. Unfixed, unsettled, uncertain.
adj. v.s.v. استهہ asthi.
adj. & s.f. Disloyal, unchaste (wife); — unchaste woman; unfaithful wife (cf. asat).
adj. & s.m. Religious, pious, devout; faithful; — a believer in a deity, future state, &c.
s.f. Sleeve; cuff
more: n. f. The sleeve of a garment. āstīn chaṛhā' nā , v. n. 1. To bully; overbear with menaces; threaten; menace. Kyoṅ garīb pe āstīn chaṛhāte ho? 2. To be ready, prepared, on the alert. āstīn kā sāṅp , n. m. A domestic enemy. Jise dost samjhā, wohī āstīn kā sāṅp niklā .
s. f. A sleeve. آستین کا سانپ āstīn kā sāmp, A domestick enemy, an enemy who wears the mask of friendship.
subs: (par or pe), To turn up the sleeves (for the purpose of, or against); to make ready (for), be prepared or ready (for); to menace, threaten
s.m. Domestic enemy; enemy in the guise of a friend.

def: s.m. Missile weapon; arrow; weapon in general
subs: adj. & s.m. Bearing arms, armed; — an armed person
s.f. The science of the use of weapons of defence; the military science
s.m. The science of arms and of war
adj. & s.m. Unarmed, defenceless; — an unarmed person.

def: s.f. Praise, eulogy, commendation, celebration, glorification, adoration, worship, invocation, prayer; hymn, anthem
more: n. f. S. स्तुति from स्तु to praise. 1. Worship; adoration; devotion. 2. Prayer; invocation; praise; glorification. 3. Psalmody; psalm; hymn. astut kar'nā , v. a. 1. To pray; invoke; to put up prayers, or petitions. 2. To bless; praise; laud; glorify; sing praises. Pirtham sumrūṅ Sarsutī, Sārdā, Gur, Ganesh. Jā kī astut kareṅ, Birhmā, Bishn, Mahesh , Play. Chaubolā .
s. f. Praise, eulogy, glorification, an anthem, hymn.
subs: (-kī), To praise, bless, glorify, invoke, hymn the praise (of).

def: s.f. Absence of applause; dispraise.
s.m. Breath, life; the five vital breaths or airs of the body; reflection, thought, or the heart as the seat of it; affection; grief.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀏𑀲𑁄 (eso), from Sanskrit एषः (eṣaḥ).

def: adv. Quickly, speedily, swiftly, directly, forthwith
subs: adj. Easily pleased or satisfied, soon appeased.

def: adj. Unfavourable, inauspicious, unlucky, bad.
adj. Unlucky, inauspicious, unpropitious, unfavourable; unfortunate; evil, bad; unbecoming, inelegant; — s.m. Inauspiciousness; unhappiness; unfavourableness; misfortune, calamity, evil; distress.
more: adj. Unfavourable, inauspicious; subst. Unhappiness, distress.

def: adj. Bad; unfavourable; unauspicious; unlucky; boding ill.
s.f. Impure, unclean, foul; — impurity; pollution.

= اشوچ aśoć, q.v. adj. Impossible to be effected by reflection or study, not contrivable; inconceivable, unimaginable; thoughtless, inconsiderate, inattentive, negligent, regardless, careless, heedless, indifferent; imprudent; — s.m. Absence of care, tranquillity, content.
( = S. अशुचि, rt. शुच्) = اسچ asuć, q.v.
s.f. (see asuć), Impurity, foulness, pollution.

ety: perf. part. of āsūdan; (ā+rt. Zend. śā; S. शा, शो
def: part. adj. Satisfied, contented; satiated, full, glutted; easy, at ease, tranquil, peaceful, comfortable, possessing a competency; affluent; — adv. In easy circumstances (in respect of, -se), well-off, well-to-do
more: adj. 1. Comfortable; affluent; possessing a competency; independent. 2. Cosy; in clover; easy in mind; sans souci. Raīyat thī āsūdah o be-khatar . Mīr Hasan. āsū'dah , adv. Well off; well to do; in easy circumstances. Woh apne ghar se āsūdah hai. āsūdah-dil, āsūdah khātir , adj. Of composed or serene mind; calm; tranquil.

adj. At rest, quiet, tranquil, glutted, satiated, satisfied, at ease, contented. آسوده حال āsūda-ḥāl, Full, at ease, affluent, in easy circumstances, comfortable, &c. Plur. آسودگان āsūdagān, Those at rest or ease, the quiet.
subs: āsūda-dil, adj. Of calm or composed mind, composed in mind, contented, calm, tranquil, serene.

def: adj. Quiet or easy in mind, composed.
s.m.f. pl. (of āsūda), Those at rest or peace, the dead.
s.f. Contentment, ease, quiet, tranquillity, calm, peace; comfort, well-being, easy circumstances.
more: n. f. P. آسودن to be at rest. 1. Quiet; peace; tranquility; ease; calm. 2. Comfort; contentment; convenience; competency; tranquil enjoyment; well being; easy circumstances; affluence. Yāṅ fikr-ī-maīshat hai, wahāṅ dagdagaë hashr, Āsūdgī harf est yahāṅ hai,na wahāṅ hai . Sandā. Here haunts the care to live; there, resurrection's fear. Heart-ease is but a name; it's neither here, nor there.

def: adj. = اشدهہ aśuddh, q.v.
adj. Impure; corrupt (as language or style); erroneous, inaccurate, incorrect, wrong.
s.f. Uncleanness, impurity; inaccuracy, incorrectness, error.
s.m. One who speaks, reads, or writes inaccurately.
more: adj. One who speaks or reads wrong.

def: adj. S. अ not, शुद्ध pure; Pālī. asuddho . Impure; unclean; polluted; defiled ( nāpāk ). Loṭā asudh hai . — kar'nā , v. a. To defile; spoil; pollute; make impure.
more: E. adj. S. अ not, सिद्ध completed. Raw; not properly cooked; unripe ( kach'chā ). Asidh ann mat khāo .
adj. Not effected, invalid, false, unripe.

def: Imperceptible, invisible; incorporeal.
s.m. Unhappiness, sorrow, pain, affliction; uneasiness, restlessness.
adj. Unhappy, sorrowful, afflicted, pained, uneasy, restless.
adj. Uneasy, unhappy, restless, afflicted.
s.m. A form of marriage among Hindūs, in which the bridegroom purchases the bride from her father and paternal kinsmen.
s.m. Evil spirit, demon. (The Asurs are said to inhabit the South pole, and are considered to be demons of the first order, and in constant hostility with the gods.)
more: n. m. Opp. of sur a god. S. असु spiritual life. Devil; demon; an evil spirit; monster; goblin. Srī Krishn, Balrām jī ne sab asuroṅ samet Kans ko mār ḍālā .
s. m. A demon. (The asurs are demons of the first order, and in constant hostility with the gods).

def: s.m. Evil spirit, demon. (The Asurs are said to inhabit the South pole, and are considered to be demons of the first order, and in constant hostility with the gods.)
more: n. f. Cor. of A. عثر Ten rupees (idiom of butchers).

def: s.f. A female demon; the wife of an asur, q.v.; — black mustard-seed.
adj. Of or belonging to evil spirits (asur); devilish, diabolical, demoniacal
more: adj. Of or belonging to the asurs, devilish, demoniacal.

def: s.f. A division of medicme, surgery, curing by cutting with instruments, applying the cautery.
s. f. Deception of demons.
s.f. Detraction, calumny, slander; malice; jealousy.
s.m. Horse ( = P. asp)
subs: (aśwa+ārūḍha), s.m. Lit. Mounted on horseback'; a horseman
s.m. Lit. 'Lord or master of horses'; a horseman; a person of rank attended by horsemen
s.f. The plant Physalis flexuosa ( = asgandh, q.v.)

s.m. The actual or emblematic sacrifice of a horse (this sacrifice is held to be one of the highest order, and when performed a hundred times it entitles the sacrificer to the dominion of swarga or Paradise)

def: s.f. A mare.
s.m. Taste, flavour, savour, relish.
adj. Black; blacker; blackest; — greater, and greatest, in respect of estimation, rank or dignity.
part. adj. Without tasto, tasteless; without flavour, without relish.
s.m. = اسگندهہ asgandh, q.v. s.m. Name of a medicinal plant, Physalis flexuosa.
s. m. Same as اسگنده asgandh, q. v.
adj. Without master or owner; having no right or title to
subs: (aswāmī+S. विक्रय), s.f. Sale without ownership; illegal sale.

def: n. f. S. अ not, स्वामी master, बिक्रयः sale; Pālī. assāmiko . Sale without ownership; illegal sale.
s.f. = انوانسي anwāṅsī, q.v. s.f. A measure (of land), 160,000 of which = one bīgha (8.000 anwāṅsī = one biswā).
more: n. f. S. अंश, H. अन्स a part. A lineal land measure; 1/20 of a kachwāṅsī .

def: s.m. Rider, horseman, trooper, cavalry-man; (also written sawār); part. adj. Mounted, riding (on), embarked (on a boat, ship, &c.)
more: n. m. S. अश्व horse. 1. A cavalry man; horseman; trooper; rider. 2. (A double entendre ) A paramour; lover; husband; spouse ( chaṛhait ). Kyā bāṅdhā hai āsan, maiṅ tujh aswār ke sadqe . Nazīr. aswār ho'nā , v. n. To mount; ride. aswār, sawār , adv. Mounted; riding; driving.
s. m. Cavalry, a horseman: mounted, riding on (any thing, as a ship, &c).
subs: (-par), To mount (upon a horse, elephant, camel, &c.); to ride (on an animal, or in a vehicle); to embark (on a ship, &c.).

def: s.f. Riding (on a horse, camel, &c. or in a vehicle); horse or other beast (that is ridden); carriage, vehicle, conveyance (of any kind, e.g. palanquin, &c.), mounted state (on horseback); equipage, train (of a great person), retinue, cavalcade, procession; the occupant of a carriage or other vehicle; possession by an evil spirit (of a person), also the person so possessed; a trick or manœuvre in wrestling (throwing one's arms from under the arms of the opponent around his neck; or throwing one's legs round the waist of the opponent and pressing against his belly)
more: n. f. 1. The act of riding or driving. Ghoṛe kī sawārī . 2. Carriage; vehicle; horses; ḍolī ; palanqueen, etc. 3. A cavalcade; retinue; procession. Rājā kī aswārī . 4. The occupant of a carriage, etc. 5. A double entendre . 6. A trick in wrestling. 7. The descent of some god, or evil spirit on a person. Mīrāṅ kī aswārī. aswārī utarwā nā , v. a. To help to dismount. aswārī denā , v. n. 1. To be ridden (a horse, etc.). 2. A double entendre. aswārī kas'nā, sawārī —, v. a. 1. To prepare or get ready a carriage, etc. 2. To mount; cross; stride. aswārī lenā,—kar'nā , v. n. To ride; mount; have a ride.
subs: v.t. To help the rider (on a horse or in a vehicle) to dismount
To serve as a mount, to be ridden (a horse, &c.)
To saddle a horse, &c.; to get ready a carriage, &c.
To mount, ride; to use (a horse, &c.); to take a ride.

def: s.f. Unselfishness, disinterestedness.
adj. & s.m. Unselfish, disinterested; — an unselfish or disinterested person.
v.s.v. اشو aśwa.
s.m. Rest, repose, recreation; cessation, completion; comfort, consolation.
s.m. = آسواس āswās, q.v. s.m. Rest, repose, recreation; cessation, completion; comfort, consolation.
s.f. pl. (of صوت ṣaut), Sounds, voices, noises; interjections.
more: s. plur. of صوت ṣaut, q. v.

def: s.m. The sacred fig-tree, Ficus religiosa.
s.m. = اسوتهہ aswattha, q.v. s.m. The sacred fig-tree, Ficus religiosa.
s.m. Withholding or refusal of assent, disassent, denial.
s.m. The sixth Hindū month (Sept.-Oct.?) = آسن āsin, q.v. s.m. The sixth month of the Hindūs (Sept.-Oct.), during which the moon is full near the stars at the head of Aries.
s.f. The first Nakshatra or lunar mansion (consisting of three stars in the head of Aries, and having the form of a horse's head).
more: n. f. S. अश्व horse. The first lunar mansion resembling a horse's head (the three stars in the head of Aries).

s. f. The first of the twenty-four constellations in the moonʼs path; hence, considered its mansions. (It consists of three stars in the head of Aries, and is so named from अश्व A horse, because represented by the symbol of a horseʼs head).

def: s.f. = اسوني aswinī, q.v. s.f. The first Nakshatra or lunar mansion (consisting of three stars in the head of Aries, and having the form of a horse's head).
more: s. f. Name of the first lunar mansion. See اسوني aswinī.

def: s.m. A millstone; a mill
s.m. A whetstone.
adj. (dakh.) Disordered: see پريشان pareshān.
adj. or adv. Very much, very great, excessive.
s.m. The custard apple, Annona squamosa or Reticulata. (Also written अता atā).
more: n. f. Excess; intemperance. Atī aur Nārāyan se bair hai . Prov. God is an enemy to excess.

adv. 1. A particle denoting excess. 2. Too; over much; very; very much; exceedingly. Atkā bhalā na barsnā, atkī bhalī na dhup; Atkā bhalā na bolnā, atkī bhalī na chup . Prov. Nor rain nor drought we would too much; Nor speech nor silence overmuch. —prep. Beyond (time, place, or degree).
s. m. Custard apple (annona squamosa or reticulata).

def: = آٿهہ āṭh, q.v. s.m. Beginning
subs: thus, so, hence, consequently, therefore, wherefore; further; now, moreover, henceforth; here beginneth.

def: s.m. Father
more: n. m. 1. One who comes; a comer. Āte āo, jāte jāo . Prov. Come when you will, go when you will. 2. Dues; arrears; bills receivable; unrealized assets. 1. Tere bāvā kā kuchh ātā hai? Do I owe your father a farthing? 2. Kyā khūb! apnā ātā na māṅgeṅ? Very fine! I am not to ask for my dues? 3. What one knows or is skilled in. ātā jātā, āte jāte ; Ped. P. āindah ravindah , n. m. A traveller; way-farer; passenger. Kisī āte jāte ke hāth kahlā bhejnā . Send word by some one coming this way. āte jāte , adv. Coming and going; going and returning. 1. Wahāṅ āte jāte do din lageṅge . It will take two days going and returning. 2. Āte jāte maiṅ na phaṅsī, aur tū kyoṅ phaṅsā, re kavve? Prov. The simple Mainā escapes the snare in which the cunning crow is caught. ā be lauṅḍe, jā be launḍe k . v. n. Mah. Wom. To order about the servant boy all day and do nothing. ā rahnā, ān rahnā , v. n. 1. To fall; fall…
subs: atā-bag (orig. atā, 'father'+big, contr. of beg, 'lord'), s.m. Master, tutor, teacher; a title given to kings and prime-ministers.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اَتَا (atā), from a Turkic language.

def: s.m. An upper room or story, apartment on the roof of a house; an attic.

ety: S. आर्द्र, Pr. अट्टं; cf. P. آرد
def: s.m. Flour, meal; anything reduced to the state of flour; powder, dust
more: s. m. Pounded wheat. When sifted it affords maida, the finer part, and sūjī, the coarser ( Qanoon-e-islam ).
subs: v.t. To grind, pound, reduce to powder
To moisten and leaven flour, to form dough; to raise the hopes (of, -kā) falsely, to feed with vain hopes, to cajole with false promises

Flour to be wetted and formed into dough; flour to be over-watered so as to become less consistent than dough; to be plunged into difficulties or trouble; to be perplexed, or despondent, or miserable, &c.
To be utterly destroyed or ruined
Lit. '(as much) salt (as is put) in flour (to savour it)'; very little, a pinch, a particle, a soupçon
To become powder or dust; to be ground or crushed to powder; to be worn out; to become worm-eaten, to be rotten, to crumble away.
wety: Inherited from Prakrit *𑀅𑀝𑁆𑀝 (*aṭṭa), from Sanskrit *आ॒र्त (*ārtá), a vṛddhi derivative of *ऋ॒त (*ṛtá, “ground”), from Proto-Indo-Iranian *Hr̥Htás, from Proto-Indo-European *h₂l̥h₁-tós (“ground”), from *h₂elh₁-. Cognate with Classical Persian آرد (ārd, “flour”), Avestan 𐬀𐬴𐬀 (aṣ̌a, “ground”), Old Armenian աղամ (ałam, “to grind”), Ancient Greek ἀλέω (aléō, “to grind”).

ety: imperf. part. of آنا ānā, q.v.
def: s.m. One who comes, a comer; that which is coming to or due, dues, unrealized debt; that with which one is conversant, what one is acquainted with, knowledge possessed
subs: s.m. (pl. āte-jāte), Traveller, way-farer; āte-jāte, adv. Coming and going; there and back.

def: s.m. The custard apple, Annona squamosa or Reticulata. (Also written अता atā).
more: n. m. The wild custard apple; Anona squamosā . Wat.
n. m. See aḍḍā . A heap; store; pile ( ḍher ).

n. m. P. ārad . Flour; meal; anything ground to powder. —adj. Worn out; decayed; mouldered; rotten. āṭā kar'nā , W. buk'nī k. , E. sufūf' k . Ped. v. a. To grind; reduce to powder. Sab chīz ko kūṭ-kar āṭā kar do . Pound all these to powder. āṭā gīlā ho'nā , v. n. lit . To be kneaded (flour). 1. To become too thin or watery for the proper consistence of dough; to become sloppy. 2. To be in difficulties; not to know what to do. 3. To be steeped in misery; to be helpless, despondent, etc. Muflisī meṅ āṭā gīlā . Prov. Misfortunes never come single. āṭā māṭī ho'nā , v. n. To be utterly destroyed, or undone. āṭā ho'nā , v. n. To be ground, or reduced to powder; to be worn out, rotten, or worm-eaten; to moulder; crumble; decay. Phr. To break to pieces at a touch. Lakṛī dharī dharī āṭā ho gāī . āṭe meṅ nūn, Hin. lit . Salt in flour. Not much; very little; a small fraction. Itnā nafa khāo, jitnā …
s. m. A custard apple: see آت āt.

ety: quasi-inf. n. fr. اعطا ěʻtā, 'giving,' &c., inf. n. iv of عطو 'to take with the hand'
def: s.f. Giving, gift; a gift, present, offering; bounty, favour, benefaction; a grant; an endowment; a concession, consideration
more: n. f. عطو giving. 1. Bounty; benefaction (انعام). 2. An endowment. 3. A concession; consideration. atā k. , v. a. To assign ( bakhshnā ); concede; accord; vest in. atā-nāma . A grant ( bakhshish-nāma ). atāë tamgā , Grant of a medal. atāë khidmat , Offer of a place or appointment.
s. f. A gift, present, favour, giving. عطا بخش aﻌt̤ā-baḵẖsh, adj. Liberal, bountiful. عطا کرنا aﻌt̤ā karnā, To grant, give, bestow, confer.
subs: or ʻat̤ā karnā, v.t. To give (a thing to, -ko, a person), to grant, bestow, confer; to assign; to concede
s.m. A deed of gift; a grant.

def: (comp. of اتا atā, Father, and بگ bag, Lord) s. m. A master, a teacher, a title given to kings or prime ministers.
s.m. v.s.v. اتا atā
s.m. One who plays on an instrument, or sings, or dances gratis. (In Western India the word signifies a self-taught singer, musician, &c.; and also self-taught singing, &c.)
more: s. One who sings and dances gratis.

def: adj. & s.m. Gifted, endowed with good parts; — a gifted man, one endowed with good parts; a self-taught man.
more: n. m. عطو a gift. 1. One who is self-taught, or who possesses natural gifts. Atāī nān-khatāī, jab dil meṅ āī toṛ khāī . Prov. The sweets by Nature given at pleasure are feasted on at one's own leisure. (Genius obeys its own instincts and will not be controlled). 2. ( Contemp .) A proficient who has not been to college. 1. Atāī kā gānā kyā? What is an amateur's singing worth? 2. Atāiyoṅ kā ilāj nahīṅ karnā chāhiye . You should not take the medicines of a quack who has not been regularly taught.

def: n. 1. Toying; casting love glances. 2. Blandishment; dalliance; coquetry; flirtation. Tū to aṭak maṭak le jāṅdyāṅ (dil) . Panj. Song. Ṭappā . You take away my heart with your bewitching gait. aṭ'ak maṭ'ak cham'pā , A wheedling hussy; a seducing jade; a wanton.

s.f. Obstacle, impediment, hindrance, bar, obstruction; anything to prevent, prevention, stoppage, check, restraint, prohibition; interruption; arrest; challenge (of a sentry); fastening (of a tent, &c.); tether; abstention; hesitation, doubt, entanglement, amour; dallying, dalliance; — the river Attock. — aṭak-maṭak (see maṭak), s.f. Amorous dalliance, fond tricks and gestures, toying, blandishments, coquetry
more: s. f. Prevention, stop, obstruction, bar, obstacle; name of a river.
subs: s.f. A wheedling hussy, a seducing jade, a wanton.

def: n. f. S. अ not, टिक् to move. 1. Hindrance; obstruction; impediment; bar; obstacle; barrier; hitch; stumbling-block. Phr. Brought to a dead stop. 2. Prevention; check; restraint; detention; caste, or social distinctions; superstition. Hukkā, sukkā, hurkanī, Gūjar, aur Jāt; Is meṅ aṭak ḳahā, Bāwā Jagarnāth kā bhāt . Prov. Hukkā and courtesan, Gūjar and Jāṭ— All's one, as rice from Father Jagarnāth . 3. Prohibition; stoppage; interruption. Sarkār ke aṭkāo se bāhar nahīṅ jā sakte . 4. A fastening. Bail kā aṭkāo khul gayā . 5. Abstinence ( parhez ); regimen. Āp ko sharāb se kyā aṭkāo hai ? 6. Doubt; hesitation; fear. Sab-hī bhūm Gopāl kī, tā meṅ aṭak kahā? Jā ke man meṅ aṭak hai, soī aṭak rahā . Prov. The earth's Gopāl's (the Lord's), no barrier me to stay, 'Tis he alone is stopped whose mind to doubt's a prey. [This couplet is ascribed to Rājāh Mān Singh who thus overcame the religious prejudices of his soldiers who were unwilling to cross the Aṭak.] aṭkāo khul'nā,—ṭūṭ'nā , v. n. 1. To be loosened, let loose, untied, or freed from restraint. Kamar kā aṭkāo khul gayā . 2. To be broken (a fast). 1. Barat kā aṭkāo khul gayā . 2. Chāṅd niksā, aṭkāo khulā . Hin. 3. To be removed (a barrier); to be allowed full liberty. Sūkh nikle pe bahū, beṭī kā aṭkāo khul jāëgā . Hin. On the appearance of Venus, the restriction on the wives and daughters will be removed.
v.s.v. اٿك aṭak.

ety: aṭak˚ = Prk. अट्टक्के(इ) or अट्टक्क(इ) = S. अट्ट+कृ
def: v.n. To be stopped, prevented, restrained, kept back; to be withheld, be irrecoverable, be unrealizable or unrealized (as pay, money due, &c.); to stick, adhere; to be entangled, be in league or in liaison (with, -se), to be enamoured (of, -se); to be engrossed (with); to be fixed (on, -meṅ, par); to be dependent (on, -par), be under the control (of); to cease, rest, remain, delay, dally, tarry, linger; to hesitate, falter
more: v. n. To be stopped, to be prevented, to adhere, to cease, rest, stick, stop.

def: s.f. Heap, pile, mass, store, stock, abundance, stack, rick (of grass, corn, &c.), cf. ٿال ṭāl.
more: s. f. A stack, a rick (of grass, corn, &c.), a heap of baggage, &c.

ety: Pr. अटल, which is also used in S., see Prof. Williams' Dict.
def: s.m. An epithet of the Deity
more: adj. Immovable, fixed, of a determined resolution.

def: s.m. One of the seven pātālas or divisions of the infernal regions; the portion immediately below the earth
s.m. = (1) اٿال aṭāl, q.v. (2). Goods, effects, baggage, materials, articles, household goods and chattels, furniture; lumber
subs: (-kā), To heap, pile, stack, store, amass
v.t. To load (a cart) till it becomes top-heavy, to overload

def: n. m. S. अट्टालक a tower, अट्ट high. 1. Accumulation; heap; pile; mass; store; stock; a large quantity; abundance. 2. A stack of corn, grass, etc; a heap; pile; a rick. 3. Goods; provision; effects; chattels; baggage; materials; articles; commodities; rubbish. 4. Furniture; household goods. aṭālā kar'nā,—lagā'nā , v. a. To pile; heap; stack. aṭālā banā'nā , E. v. a. To erect a lofty building. aṭālā lād'nā , v. a. To over-load (a cart).
s.f. Fixedness, unchangeableness, &c. (see aṭal).
s.f. Household goods and chattels, furniture. (See aṭārī and aṭālā).
s.m. Private tutor, preceptor.
n. m. A private tutor; an instructor.
s.m. = اتاليق atālīq, q.v. s.m. Private tutor, preceptor.
s.f. Private tuition; education; — preceptorship, tutorship.
s. f. Private tuition.
s.m. Heap, pile, &c. ( = اٿالا aṭālā, q.v.). s.m. = (1) اٿال aṭāl, q.v. (2). Goods, effects, baggage, materials, articles, household goods and chattels, furniture; lumber
subs: (-kā), To heap, pile, stack, store, amass
v.t. To load (a cart) till it becomes top-heavy, to overload

def: (dakh.) To be destroyed or ruined.
v.s.v. آٿا āṭā.
s.m. A multitude or crowd of people; a tribe.
more: s. (dakh. i. q. جماعت or کنبا) Family, tribe, people (?).

def: n. f. Suicide; self-murder.
A Suicide; a self-murderer; a felo de se .
n. m. S. आत्मज्ञान. Knowledge of the soul; self-knowledge.
adj. More, or most, perfect or complete.
more: adj. compar. (of تام) More or most perfect.

def: adv. Here and there, everywhere; up and down; all about.
s.f. Walking about, roaming, wandering.
more: s. m. plur. of اٿا aṭā, q. v.

def: s.m. Balcony; upper room. (See اٿا aṭā).
v. a. Caus. of aṭnā , To fit; fill; get into.
v.t. To fix (a thing, into, -meṅ); to fill, get (a thing, into); to fasten (on, -meṅ), to join (to, -meṅ).
s.m. Fear, awe; pomp, show; dignity; sickness, disease; the sound of a drum or tabor
more: s. m. Fear, apprehension: disease, affliction, pain: parade, ostentation, show, pomp.
subs: To establish (or inspire) fear or awe.

def: n. f. The notched extremity of the horn of a bow.
s.f. The notched extremity of a bow, the horn of a bow.
more: s. f. The notched extremity or horn of a bow.

def: s.m. Fear, awe; pomp, show; dignity; sickness, disease; the sound of a drum or tabor
subs: To establish (or inspire) fear or awe.

def: = اتينت atyant, q.v. adj. & adv. Much, very much, exceeding, vast; — exceedingly, too
subs: adv. To the utmost, to the very last degree.

def: (and H. atan), Lit. 'Bodiless'; — s.m. Kāmdeva, the god of love among the Hindūs.
more: n. prop. Kāmdeʼo, the god of love among the Hindūs.

def: s.m. Heat of the sun; sunshine, sunbeams.
s.m. = اٿالا aṭāla, q.v. s.m. = (1) اٿال aṭāl, q.v. (2). Goods, effects, baggage, materials, articles, household goods and chattels, furniture; lumber
subs: (-kā), To heap, pile, stack, store, amass
v.t. To load (a cart) till it becomes top-heavy, to overload

def: s.f. A thatched upper room, upper room; balcony; terrace.
more: s. f. A thatched upper room.
wety: Inherited from Sanskrit अट्टालिका (aṭṭālikā). Cognate with Bhojpuri अटारी (aṭārī), Punjabi اٹاری / ਅਟਾਰੀ (aṭārī), Gujarati અટારી (aṭārī), Marathi अटोळा (aṭoḷā), Odia ଅଟାଳି (aṭāḷi).

def: n. f. S. अट्टाल. Upper room; balcony (bālā-kḥānā) ; terrace. 1. Chaṛhī aṭārī, dekheṅ nārī . Song. The women went up to the balcony and began to look from there. 2. Bhab dekhī chhaṭā, bhab dekhī chhaṭā. Gaurī man-mohan ṭhārī aṭā . Tir. Song. 3. Damṛī ke pān piṭaryā meṅ! Morī torī bāteṅ aṭaryā meṅ! Song. A farthing's pān in her piṭārī! "We'll meet my love in my aṭārī! "
s.m. Land that is left uncultivated.
part. adj. (f. -ā), Unsatisfied; dissatisfied.
adv. The day after to-morrow, &c. ( = ترسون tarsoṅ, q.v.). adv. The third day past; the third day to come (two days intervening in each case; cf. parsoṅ).
adv. S. अति beyond, परश्वस, H. परसों the day after to-morrow. The fourth day.
s.f. Thirsting; thirst.
adj. Throwing fire.
adj. Kindling fire. s. Fuel, an incendiary.
adj. Casting out fire.
adj. Kindling, spreading or stirring up fire. s. Fire-kindler, an incendiary, a seditious person.
adj. Flaming, fiery, raining fire. s. A firelock, a tinder-box.
adj. Throwing fire.
adj. Scattering fire.
s. f. The region of fire, a place where fire abounds; (hence the word is applied to) a hot fire of cannon or small arms in battle; a large fire, a funeral pile.
s. m. A furnace, grate, chimney, a temple of fire-worshippers.
(Fire eater) s. m. Name of a bird, a variety of Tetrao rufus, Lin: called in Hindī چکور chakor, q. v.
adj. Fiery, hot.
s. m. A spark, a lighted coal; a beautiful person; an exciter of quarrels; quarrelsome.
s. f. The worship of fire.
Pouring out fire; an incendiary, an exciter of quarrels.
adj. Fiery-tempered.
Striking fire; a striker of fire.
s. f. Striking fire.
adj. Strong, coarse (as cloth); — s.m. Coarse, strong cloth.
more: (perhaps, from अ and ٿٿي A skreen or mat) adj. Coarse, strong (cloth).

def: W. n. m. Coarse, strong cloth.
= آتتائي ātatāʼī, q.v.
s.m. (f. -inī). = H اتتاهي अतत्ताही atattāhī, s.m. Felon; thief; incendiary; ravisher; murderer; one who does any grievous wrong
subs: To commit a grievous wrong; to spoil, rob, &c.; to transgress, exceed bounds; to exaggerate.

def: adj. (f. -ī), Powerless; without authority.
adj. v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.

E. n. m. S. आततायिन् Pālī. ātatāyī murderer. One who seizes another's lands or wife, or does any grievous wrong. atat'tah kar'nā , v a. 1. To exaggerate; magnify; overrate. 2. To exceed bounds; to carry to extremes; to encroach upon; to oppress; to use violence; crush; grind down.
s.m. (f. -inī). Felon; thief; incendiary; ravisher; murderer; one who does any grievous wrong
subs: To commit a grievous wrong; to spoil, rob, &c.; to transgress, exceed bounds; to exaggerate.

def: s.f. Lit. 'A place to roam in'; wood, grove, forest, jungle, wilderness.
s.m. Followers, dependants.
more: n. m. Ped. for تابعلري q. v.

def: adj. (f. -ī), Not bright, dull, dim, dark.

ety: S. अ+त्रिक; or स्थापक, स्थायक, rt. स्था
def: adj. Without support, unsupported.
s.m. pl. (of طعام t̤aʻām), Meats, viands, victuals.
s. f. Name of a town.
more: 1. part. Marking, marked, chosen. 2. s. Ӕther.

def: s.m. A hollow stick or reed on which thread is wound preparatory to spinning, &c., winder (for thread), reel, distaff; spinning wheel (syn. ćarḵẖī), a weaver's reel or shuttle (syn. taklī); the woof about the quill; — the lounge or circle in which a horse is trained in the manège; grapple in wrestling
more: s. m. 1. A skein or bundle of thread, a reel. 2. The lounge (in the manage).
subs: v.t. To make (one) as thin as a stick, reduce to a skeleton; to make (one) jump or dance (by beating, &c.)
To become as thin as a stick, to be reduced to a skeleton.

def: n. m. 1. A reel, or turning frame. 2. The lounge or circle in which a horse trained in the manege ; a grapple in wrestling. aṭeran kar de'nā , v. a. 1. To reduce to mere skin and bone. Is ranḍī ne jawān ādmī ko aṭeran kar dȳā 2. To make one reel, or dance. Mārte mārte aṭeran kar dȳā. aṭeran ho jā'nā , v. n. To become very thin; to be reduced to skin and bone. Do din meṅ sūkh-kar aṭeran ho gayā .
v.t. To wind (thread) for the purpose of forming it into skeins, &c., to make up thread into skeins; to wind, reel (so also aṭer lenā); to lounge (a horse = kāvā denā).
more: v. a. 1. To make up thread into skeins, to reel. 2. To lounge a horse.

def: v. a. 1. To make up thread into skeins; to reel. Baṭṭhī ke kare saë? Sūt ne aṭer le? Rus. Wom. What are you doing sitting there? why don't you reel the thread? 2. To lounge (a horse) (kāvā denā) .
s.m. Inclination, favour, kindness, compassion, affection; a present, bounty; (in Gram.) connection, adjunction, apposition; a connective
more: n. m. ( Gram .) A connective. atf mātūf , The words, phrases, or sentences connected by 'and.' harf-i-atf ; S. समुञ्चायक The conjunction 'and.'
s. m. Favour, affection, kindness, a present, bounty. حرف عطف ḥarf-i-aﻌt̤f, A copulative conjunction.
subs: s.m. 'Particie of connection,' a copulative conjunction.

def: s.m. pl. (of طفل), Children, offspring, family.

adj. S. अति much, गम् to go, H. gat condition. 1. Much; very much; too much; very great; large; overmuch; exceeding; considerable; excessive. Maiṅ to kartī hūṅ dugānāh se bhalāī atgat, Aur woh kartī hai bandī se burāī atgat . Wom. Rangīn. 2. Exorbitant; unreasonable; immoderate. Chal bhī! dar gor ho terī sūrat! Itnā bhī chheṛte nahīṅ atgat . Wom. Shauq. Away! the grave that face devour. Hands off! these freedoms are too much.
s.m. Beginning
more: conj. (or inceptive particle used to introduce a remark, question, affirmation, &c.) Now, thus, so and so, further, moreover.

s. m. 1. Meaning, signification, acceptation. 2. Intention, design, motive. 3. Cause, sake. 4. Property, wealth, substance. تپسیارتهہ तपस्यार्थ tapasyārth, For devotionʼs sake, for devotional purposes.
subs: thus, so, hence, consequently, therefore, wherefore; further; now, moreover, henceforth; here beginneth.

def: adj. Eight
more: adj. Eight. آٿهہ آٿهہ آنسورونا āṭh āṭh āṅsū ronā, To shed floods of tears, to weep exceedingly. آٿهہ پہر āth pahar, All the twenty-four hours; constantly. آٿهہ کهنبا āṭh khambā, A canopy supported by eight posts.
subs: adj. In a state of confusion, disordered, scattered, dispersed ( = tīn-terah); perplexed, disturbed, distressed
To shed floods of tears, to weep exceedingly or bitterly
v.t. To cause (one) to weep bitterly, &c.
(and āṭhoṅ-pahar), adv. Through or during the eight watches of the day, throughout the twenty-four hours, day and night; constantly, perpetually, always
(or āṭh-) pahrī, aṭh-pahriyā, s.m. An eight-watch man, one who is constantly on duty (as a man set to watch crops, &c.)
(or āṭh-) konī, adj. & s.m. Octangular; — any eight-cornered thing
(or āṭh-) khambā, s.m. A canopy or any structure supported by eight posts or pillars
aṭh-māsā, aṭh-wāṅsā (S. ashṭa+māsa, or māsaka), s.m. Land constantly ploughed for sugar-cane for the eight months from Asāṛh to Māgh inclusive
s.f. A weight of eight māshas; a gold mohur weighing eight māshas (value ten rupees)
(i.e. āṭh+āna+ī), s.f. A silver coin worth eight annas, an eight-anna piece, a half-rupee
(S. ashṭa+vāra+ka), s.m. The eighth day after any other day; a period of eight days; a week; the use, or loan, of a thing for a period of eight days
(S. ashṭa+uttara+śata), adj. One hundred and eight
coll. s. & adj. All eight, the whole eight, the eight

def: adj. Eight
subs: adj. In a state of confusion, disordered, scattered, dispersed ( = tīn-terah); perplexed, disturbed, distressed
To shed floods of tears, to weep exceedingly or bitterly
v.t. To cause (one) to weep bitterly, &c.

(or āṭh-) pahrī, aṭh-pahriyā, s.m. An eight-watch man, one who is constantly on duty (as a man set to watch crops, &c.)
(or āṭh-) konī, adj. & s.m. Octangular; — any eight-cornered thing
(or āṭh-) khambā, s.m. A canopy or any structure supported by eight posts or pillars
aṭh-māsā, aṭh-wāṅsā (S. ashṭa+māsa, or māsaka), s.m. Land constantly ploughed for sugar-cane for the eight months from Asāṛh to Māgh inclusive
s.f. A weight of eight māshas; a gold mohur weighing eight māshas (value ten rupees)
(i.e. āṭh+āna+ī), s.f. A silver coin worth eight annas, an eight-anna piece, a half-rupee

coll. s. & adj. All eight, the whole eight, the eight

def: adj. S. अष्टन्, Pr. अट्ठे Z. and P. ﮩشت Eight. āṭh aṭhāra, tīn terah , adj. Scattered; dispersed; thrown into disorder. Tīn terah āṭh aṭhāra kar dȳā. āṭh āṭh āṅsū ro'nā , v. n. Wom. To shed a flood of tears; to weep bitterly; to cry one's eyes out. Māṅ ko yād kar-ke āṭh āṭh āṅsū rotī hai . Wom. āṭh āṭh āṅsū rulā'nā , v. a. To cause to weep bitterly, or without ceasing 1. Āṭh āṭh āṅsū rolātī hai mujhe chāh us kī, Roz o shab rahte haiṅ ashk āṅkhoṅ se jārī, annā . Wom. Raṅgīn. 2. Kuchh bhī tujh ko na merā pās āyā; Āṭh āṭh āṅsū mujh ko rulwāyā . Wom. Shauq. āṭh pahar, āṭhoṅ pahar, chauṅsaṭh ghaṛī . 1. During the eight watches of the day and night; all the twenty-four hours; the live long day; night and day. Āṭh pahar chauṅsaṭh ghaṛī rote bīte moë . 2. Constantly; perpetually; always. Tujhe to āṭh pahar haṅste guzartā hai. aṭh pah'rī—pah'īrā,—pahr'yā , n. One who is always on duty. Applied to a servant employed to collect rents, or set to watch the crops and to take messages for the rest of the villagers. aṭh kauṅsal , n. f. (Cor. of the Eng. Council.) 1. Council; meeting; assembly. 2. Whispering; talking in a low tone. aṭh ko'nī . A. musamman , P. hasht pahlū . Octangular; eight-sided. aṭh kham'bā , n. m. A canopy or building supported by eight posts or pillars. aṭh-mā' sā, aṭhwāṅ'sā , n. m. 1. An eight month's child. 2. Lands constantly ploughed for eight months for sugar-cane; or, from Asāṛh to Māgh , both inclusive. aṭh-mā'shī , n. f. 1. A weight weighing eight māshas . 2. A gold mohur weighing eight māshas , worth ten rupees.
= اتهاه athāh, q.v. adj. & s.m. Unfathomable, bottomless, very deep, out of a man's depth, unfordable; — a great depth, an abyss.
more: adj. Deep, unfordable, unfathomable, out of manʼs depth.
v. n. past tense (dakh.) Was: see تها thā.

def: adj. S. स्थान, H. thā place, ground. Deep; unfordable; unfathomable; bottomless.
adj. & s.m. Unfathomable, bottomless, very deep, out of a man's depth, unfordable; — a great depth, an abyss.
more: adj. Unfathomable, bottomless, very deep. s. An abyss. See اتها athā.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀅𑀢𑁆𑀣𑀸𑀳 (atthāha), from Sanskrit अस्थाघ (asthāgha, “very deep”).

def: s.f. A place where people meet to converse and amuse themselves, assembly-room (also written اتهائي athāʼī: syn. چوپاڙ ćaupāṛ).
s. f. A place where people meet to converse and amuse themselves.
adj. Twenty-eight.
adj. Twenty-eight.
adj. (f. -ā), Unwearied; insensible of fatigue.
more: adj. Unwearied, untired, insensible of fatigue.

def: adj. (f. -ā), Unstable, unsteady, wavering; — s.m. Land farmed or rented.
s.m. The act, and also the ceremony, of bathing a bride and bridegroom on the third day after marriage. (Eight men and eight women perform this ceremony for the bridegroom and bride respectively).
more: s. m. Bathing of the bride and bridegroom together, the third day after marriage.

def: Tir. n. m. S. अष्ट H. आठ eight. Bathing of the bride and bridegroom respectively by eight men and women on the third day after marriage.
adj. Ninety-eight.

E. n. f. A ceremony observed on the seventeenth of Kātik , when five or eight women of the neighbourhood stand in a circle and pound rice or bricks, while they sing and curse their brothers in the belief that their lives will be lengthened thereby. They finish by pricking their tongues with thorns. ( Behar ).
s.f.; v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
n. f. An eight-anna silver piece.
s.f. v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
s.m. The pure.
adj. Eighteenth.
adj. Eighteenth.
s. m. Name of the fourth Veda.
s.m. The name of the fourth of the Vedas.
s.m. The name of the fourth of the Vedas.
adj. & s.m. Appertaining to the Atharvan Veda; — a Brahman versed in the Atharvan Veda.
adj. Eighty-eight.
adj. S. अष्ठाशीतिः Pr. अट्ठासीइ. Eighty-eight.
adj. S. अष्टासप्ततिः , Seventy-eight.
adj. Seventy-eight.
conj. Or, or even, or else; likewise.
adj. Twenty-eight.
= اٿهانوے aṭṭhānve, q.v.
= اٿهاسي aṭṭhāsī, q.v.
= اٿهتر aṭhattar.
adj. Not to be pushed out of its place; not to be put aside; firm, immovable; irrefragable; unanswerable.
E. adj. S. अ + स्था stand. Immoveable. See aṭal .
adj. Seventy-eight.
adj. (dakh.) Ninety eight.
adj. (f. -ā), Unstable, unsteady; vacillating, wavering.
= اٿکهيلي aṭkhelī, q.v
v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
s. f. Playfulness, wantonness.
v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.

v. n. S. अट् wander, H. aiṅṭh a twist. 1. To walk affectedly or coquettishly; to express tenderness by gestures (itrānā) . 2. To stammer; mumble; mouth; drawl; clip one's words; lisp (tutlānā). Bachchoṅ kī tarah aṭhlā-ke mat bolo . 3. To give crooked answers (ṭeṛhā bolnā) . 4. To speak crossly, harshly, rudely. Maiṅ ne to sīdhe subhāo bāt pūchhī, woh yoṅhī aṭhlātī hai . 5. To pretend ignorance; to affect; not to know (maṭyānā , E.). Jān būjh-kar mat aṭhlāo . 6. To oppose; resist; contend with; to cross (one). Mujh se aiṅṭh lāyā, to sīdhā kar dūṅgā . W.
q. v.
s.m. Sunset; the west (cf. aṭhmanā).
s.m. The West.
= H اٿهماسا अठमासा aṭhmāsā, v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
= H اتهماس अठमास aṭhmās, v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.

adv. S. याम् watch. Every hour of the day; day and night; always. Ab tum tajo garab, gumān, āṭhoṅ jām bhajo Bhagwān. Ab to kar le kar se kuchh dān, jis meṅ ho terā kalyān . Song. Khayāl . Now throw aside your pride, and praise God night and day, And with your hand, hand alms, salvation find you may. āṭhoṅ gāṅṭh kummaid, — — kummait , adj. 1. Skilful; clever; accomplished; gifted ( chātur ). 2. Shrewd; sagacious; needle-witted ( syānā ). 3. Expert; dexterous; adroit; smart; quick; ready ( tez ). 4. Cunning; nimble; fine-fingered; sharp ( chālāk ). 5. Conversant; versed; master of; cut out for; at home in ( ustād ). 6. Experienced; practised.
v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
— v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
q. v.
adj. Sixty-eight.
q. v.
= اڙتاليس aṛtālīs, q.v. adj. Thirty-eight.
= اڙتيس aṛtīs, q.v. adj. Thirty-eight.
adj. Eighth.
adj. S. अष्टमः Eighth. āṭh'wāṅ hissā . The eighth part.
adj. Eighth.
= اٿهماسا aṭhmāsā, q.v., s.v. آٿهہ āṭh. = H اتهماس अठमास aṭhmās, v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
E. n. m. 1. The eighth day; eight days; a week. 2. The use of agricultural implements for a period of eight days. 3. A loan payable in full or by instalments at the end of the week.
s. m. The eighth day after any other; a week.
s. (dakh.) A week or eight days.
v.s.v. آٿهہ āṭh.
s.f. = اٿواٿی کهٿواٿي aṭwāṭī-khaṭwāṭī, q.v. s.f. Taking to one's bed in grief or trouble, &c.
more: s. f. The state of being confined to bed through sickness, &c.
subs: bag and baggage, household goods and chattels
or — lekar paṛnā, v.n. To take to one's bed, &c.

def: s.f. Twist, twine, turn, flexure, fold, ply, plait; bundle, hank or skein of thread; sheaf; handful of stalks of grain; a turban (a cant term)
subs: s.f. Complication, twisting, folding together; contortion.

def: adv. (used chiefly as first member of compounds), Very much, very great; too great; very greatly, excessively; too
more: prep. Beyond (in point of time, place, or degree), exceeding, surpassing, very, very much, exceedingly.
prep. Up, upwards, on high, over, above. It implies superiority in place and degree, and is the reverse of अध adha.

def: = ات ati, q.v. For compounds beginning with atī-, see ات ati-. adv. (used chiefly as first member of compounds), Very much, very great; too great; very greatly, excessively; too
s.m. (f. -trī), A great talker.
adj. A great talker, a babbler.
adj. & s.m. Very powerful; — great strength.
adv. Frequently, very frequent.
adv. Frequently.
s.m. pl. (of طبيب t̤abīb), Physicians.
adv. Frequently; very frequently, or often; — adj. Much, excessive, unlimited.
more: adv. or adj. Much, excessive, frequently.

def: s.m. A very great or excessive burden.
s.m. The rapid motion of a planet from one side to another.
s.m. Great heat; violent inflammation.
s.m. Munificence, liberality.
adj. Very poor or needy, very distressed, very miserable.
s.m. A great fault or crime.
s.m. A great distance
s.f. Great difficulty or distress.
adj. Very difficult.

ety: for A. عاطفة, v.n. fr. عطف 'to incline' (to
def: s.f. Affection, kindness, benevolence; ten derness, mercy, pity, compassion.
more: (from عطف Heb. To incline, to cover) s. f. Kindness, benevolence, affection.

def: s.m. Lemon grass, Andropogon schœnanthus.
adj. (f. -ā), Very proud, arrogant.
adj. & adv. Very much, very great; too much; exceeding, extreme, excessive, immoderate, exorbitant.
s.f. Intense disgust, abhorrence.
adj. (f. -ā), Closely hidden or concealed, very secret.
adj. (f. -ā) & s.m. Exceedingly delighted; — great joy.
s.m. Violent laughter, horse-laugh.
adj. Very wakeful; restless: — s.m. The black curlew.
adj. (f. -ā), Very old, decayed.
adj. (f. -ā), Very worthy.
adv. Much, excessively.
more: part. adj. Stopped; stuck; aground. —n. m. The vessel in which victuals are dressed for the public at the door of the temple of Jagarnāth .
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian اِتِّکَاء (ittikā'), from Arabic اِتِّكَاء (ittikāʔ).

def: s.m. Delay, long time.
adj. & s.m. Of extraordinary body or size, gigantic; — a giant; a certain rākshas.
adj. (f. -ā), Not sharp, not keen or shrewd, dull, obtuse.
s.f. Bluntness, dullness, obtuseness.

ety: for A. عاطلة, fem. of عاطل ʻāt̤il, act. part. of عطل 'to be destitute' (of
def: adj. Destitute (of ornaments, &c.); void (of); without diacritical points (a word); — s.m. A word without diacritical points, a bare or naked word.
adj. (f. -ā), Beyond the cognizance of the senses.
s.m. Excessive drinking, inebriety; a drunkard.
adj. & s.m. Very strong; — great strength.
s.m. A heinous sin, a great crime.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), Guilty of a very great or heinous sin or crime; very guilty; — a criminal.
s.f., Lit. 'Come, find,' A game played by children, not unlike the Eng. game of 'Hot beans and butter.'
more: n. f. lit . Come, find. Children's game.

ety: act. part. of عطر 'to perfume oneself'
def: adj. Fragrant, odoriferous; — beneficent, generous, noble, gracious.
more: (part. act. of عطر) adj. Odoriferous, benevolent, generous, noble.

def: adj. Excessive, exceeding.
adj. (f. -ā), Surpassing, exceeding; in excess (of, -se); in addition (to, -se), besides.
s.m. Consumption.
s.m. A very poisonous root used in medicine, Aconitum.
more: s. m. Name of a root used in medicine.

def: n. m. A root used in medicine. Aconitum heterophyllum . Wat.
adj. (f. -ā), Very powerful.
s.f. Great strength or power.
s.f. Heroic valour, prowess.
s.m. A great accumulation; a hoard.
s.m. Dysentery; diarrhœa.
Wom. n. m. S. अति much, सृ to go. Dysentery; diarrhœa. Hamārā khilāyā pilāyā tere antisār ho-ke nikle ! Wom. (A curse). May all my feeding come out of you in dysentery!
s.m. (f. -inī), One who is afflicted with dysentery.
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), Purgative; affected with dysentery; — A person who is affected with dysentery.
adv. Very much, excessively, extremely.

ety: Pehl. ātāsh, ātars; Z. ātar; cf. S. अथरि
def: s.f. Fire, flame; anger, passion, rage
more: n. f. Ped. for H. āg, āṅch , Z. ātars . Fire; anger; passion; rage. ātish kā parkālā , H. āg kā putlā , n. 1. Sparks; scintillation; flames. Gusse meṅ ātish kā parkālā ban gayā . 2. A very sharp, knowing, wicked person an incendiary; fire brand. Ātish ke parkāle ko kaun chheṛ-kar balā le ? Who would bring evil on his head by provoking this firebrand? 3. One who is too full of energy and activity. 4. A very beautiful person; a brilliant dancer; a great coquette.
subs: adj. & s.m.f. Kindling fire; mischief-making, seditious, factious; — fuel; mischief-maker, firebrand, incendiary
adj. Casting, or casting out, fire
adj. & s.m.f. Kindling fire, spreading fire, stirring up fire, &c. ( = ātish-afroz, q.v.)
(bār, rt. of bārīdan, 'to rain'), adj. & s.m. Raining fire; flaming; flery; — a fire-lock; tinder-box
(bāz, rt. of bāḵẖtan or of bāzīdan, 'to play'), s.m. A maker of fireworks, a pyrotechnist
s.m. Spark, a lighted coal; a beautiful person; an exciter of quarrels; — adj. Quarrelsome
s.m. A fire-worshipper, guebre, one of the sect of the Magi, a disciple of Zoroaster
s.m. Fire-temple; fire-place; a park of artillery ( = top-ḵẖāna)
s.m. Fire-eater; the bartavella or Greek partridge ( = H. ćakor); a salamander
s.m. Any receptacle for fire, fire-place, grate, chafing-dish, brazier
adj. & s.m. Pouring out or scattering fire; — incendiary; fomenter of quarrels ( = ātish-afroz)
s.f. Conflagration; setting fire to houses (whether accidentally or by design), arson
and -zana, s.m. Striking fire; that which strikes fire; tinder; touchwood; anything combustible; a tinder-box with the flint and steel
s.f. The act of striking fire; also = ātish-zadagī
s.f. Region of fire; a place where fire abounds; a hot cannonade or musketry (in battle); a large fire; a funeral pile
adj. & s.m. Scattering fire; — a volcano
s.m. Spark, flame, scintillation; a firebrand, an incendiary; a very astute and wicked person; a very active and energetic person; a very beautiful person
s.m. Furnace; grate; chimney; fire-worshippers' temple
adj. Of a fiery disposition, hot-tempered, passionate, &c. ( = ātish-t̤abʻ)

def: adj. Thirsting, thirsty.
